parameters.query:
SELECT 
    o.id, o.quantity, o.start_count, o.service_id, o.link, o.user_id ,
    s.min_qty as main_min, s.refill_service_id,
    s2.min_qty as refill_min, s2.price as refill_cost
FROM orders o
JOIN services s ON o.service_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN services s2 ON s.refill_service_id = s2.id
WHERE o.id = $1;
